notes:
What's new in 1.3.0:
- Search now defaults Message Type to All Message Types so Supplies and Procurement searches can cover every known request type for the selected business event.
- The Search results grid now includes a sortable, filterable Message Type column to show which request type each match came from.
- Changing Business Event or using Reset Search returns Message Type to All Message Types.

Also new in 1.2.9 (if upgrading from 1.2.8 or earlier):
- Procurement searches now include Asset Movement and Inventory Removal message types.
- Message Type choices are displayed as readable labels like Purchase Order, Invoice Verification, and Distribute Tax while preserving exact request/response matching.
- Optional raw log content API support improves compatibility with hosted environments that expose raw content directly.
- Anonymous telemetry and reporting tools now include richer usage summaries, payload preview, MSI download reports, and an HTML download report.
- Fixes include Last Updated sorting on the Log Files tab, stale prepared search content after raw content refresh, and several release/user-guide packaging issues.
